title: Intuit's platforms QuickBooks, Credit Karma, and TurboTax are unlocking new USDC capabilities
message_html: Intuit's platforms QuickBooks, Credit Karma, and TurboTax are unlocking new USDC capabilities ...
snippet: Circle (@circle): Intuit’s platforms QuickBooks, Credit Karma, and TurboTax are unlocking new USDC capabilities. We partnered to bring stablecoin-powered settlement into everyday financial workflows. @jerallaire with @theallinpod on what this unlocks.
